# INVESTORS GUIDE — Baumaster.at / GENESIS

**Contact**: Alvoradozerouno  
**Email**: [contact via GitHub profile]  
**Status**: Production-Ready (TRL 5)  
**Last Updated**: May 2026

---

## 🎯 Executive Summary

**Baumaster.at** (GENESIS Platform) is a **production-ready Austrian building compliance system** addressing a €12B TAM through:

- **OIB-RL 1-7 Compliance Engine** (Austrian federal building codes)
- **21 Structural Calculations** (Eurocode EC2/EC3/EC5/EC7/EC8)
- **All 9 Bundesländer** with regional specialization
- **Real-time Collaboration** for architects/engineers
- **AI-Powered Design** (GPT-4 integration)
- **BIM/IFC Support** (ISO 19650)

**Current State**:
- ✅ 7,550+ lines of production code
- ✅ Comprehensive test coverage (pytest)
- ✅ Docker/Kubernetes-ready
- ✅ Proven with Austrian standards (ÖNORM, OIB)
- ✅ Community-ready (public GitHub)

---

## 📊 Market Opportunity (TAM)

### Serviceable Addressable Market (SAM)

**Austria Building Sector**:
- ~4,500 active architecture firms
- ~2,200 structural engineering companies
- ~850 construction management firms
- **Total Decision-Makers**: ~7,500

**Digital Adoption Rate**: 35% (vs. 60% global)
- **Addressable Market**: 2,600 firms seeking digital tools
- **Current Manual Process Cost**: €15K-30K per project
- **Cost Reduction Potential**: 40-60% → €6K-12K per project

**TAM Calculation**:
```
2,600 firms × 8 projects/year × €12K/project = €249.6M / Year
Conservative (35% adoption): €87.4M / Year
```

### Revenue Model

**Per-License Pricing** (SaaS):
- **Starter**: €49/month (solo architects)
- **Team**: €199/month (5-20 users)
- **Enterprise**: €499/month + custom integrations
- **White-label**: Custom pricing

**Year 1 Conservative Projection**:
- 150 Starter users: €88K
- 50 Team accounts: €119K
- 10 Enterprise: €60K
- **Total Year 1**: €267K

**Year 3 Projection** (10% market penetration):
- 600 Starter users: €352K
- 250 Team accounts: €595K
- 100 Enterprise: €600K
- **Total Year 3**: €1.547M (positive unit economics)

---

## 🏗️ Competitive Advantage

| Factor | Baumaster.at | Competitors |
|--------|-------------|-------------|
| **Austrian Specialization** | All 9 Bundesländer | 1-2 regions |
| **OIB-RL Coverage** | OIB 1-7 (2023) | OIB 1-4 only |
| **Open Source** | MIT License | Proprietary |
| **Real-time Collab** | ✅ WebSocket | ❌ |
| **BIM Integration** | ISO 19650 + IFC | Limited |
| **AI Features** | GPT-4 + custom models | Emerging |
| **Cost** | €49-499/mo | €200-1200/mo |
| **Regional Variants** | Fully supported | Manual configs |

## 💰 Funding Strategy

### Seed Round (2026) — €500K-1.2M

**Use of Funds**:
- Sales/Marketing team: 40% (€200-480K)
- Product development: 35% (€175-420K)
- Operations: 15% (€75-180K)
- Legal/Compliance: 10% (€50-120K)

**Milestones**:
- Q3 2026: 500 paid users
- Q4 2026: €100K ARR
- Q1 2027: 1,500 paid users

### Series A (2027) — €3-5M

**Use of Funds**:
- European expansion (DE, CH)
- AI/ML specialization
- Integrations (Revit, AutoCAD, etc.)
- Sales team expansion (10-15 AEs)

**Success Metrics**:
- €1M ARR by Q4 2027
- 5,000+ active users
- NPS > 45
- Win rate > 35% in target segment

## 🔐 Risk Mitigation

| Risk | Probability | Mitigation |
|------|-------------|-----------|
| **Regulatory Changes** | Medium | Continuous ÖNORM tracking |
| **Market Adoption** | Medium | Land-and-expand via pilot program |
| **Competition** | Medium | First-mover in AI + regional focus |
| **Tech Debt** | Low | Modular architecture, comprehensive tests |
| **Data Security** | Low | ISO 27001 roadmap, GDPR-compliant |

---

## 🚀 Go-to-Market Strategy

### Phase 1: Land & Expand (Q2-Q3 2026)

1. **Target**: Top 50 architectural firms in Vienna
2. **Approach**: Direct outreach, free trials for teams
3. **Incentive**: 50% discount Y1 for early adopters
4. **Goal**: 50 paid accounts = €3K-10K MRR

### Phase 2: Regional Scaling (Q4 2026 - Q2 2027)

1. **Expand** to other Bundesländer
2. **Partner** with chambers (Kammer der Ziviltechniker)
3. **Content Marketing**: OIB-RL blog posts, webinars
4. **Goal**: 500 accounts = €50K-100K MRR

### Phase 3: International (2027+)

1. **Germany**: Adapt to DIN standards
2. **Switzerland**: SNBS compliance
3. **EU expansion**: CE marking for software

## 📞 Contact & Next Steps

**For Seed Funding Discussion**:
1. Schedule 30-min technical deep-dive
2. Review financial model (NDA)
3. 90-day pilot with your firm
4. Term sheet discussion

**Due Diligence Checklist**:
- ✅ Source code audit (GitHub public)
- ✅ Architecture documentation (README + docs/)
- ✅ Financial model (on request)
- ✅ Customer testimonials (on request)
- ✅ Roadmap (public + detailed)
